_readme: Every folder under drafts/ must have an entry here. Statuses: pending (art generated, lesson not yet resolved - blocks new generation), scheduled (held for a future release_date), published, rejected-quality, rejected-duplicate, transferred (moved to a sister site). Validated by scripts/check-drafts-ledger.py; scripts/preflight-image-generation.py locks a slug here before any image generation.

baseball-glove-with-ball.note: Generated after preflight, then set aside before publication because the July 8 current slot was occupied by cozy-reading-lamp during the same run. Draft sheet retained outside public navigation.

detailed-pinecone.note: Process frames never convincingly led to the final sketch; pulled from the Day 007 slot after review. Final art may still be reusable via derived process overlays.

marker-flames.note: Marker-doodle style test that seeded Doodlea.day's hot-rod-marker-flames Day 001 lesson.

old-fashioned-desk-fan.note: Reviewed six-panel desk-fan process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, derivative, JSON-LD, internal-link, and asset checks.

quiet-farm-lane.note: Process frames did not match the final fence, lane, bushes, and hills; pulled from the Day 007 slot after review.

red-barn-silo.note: Final outpaced the process frames; pulled from the Day 007 slot after review.

rocky-shore-lighthouse.note: Reviewed six-panel lighthouse process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.

sandcastle-by-the-shore.note: Slug locked for image generation by preflight; resolve before any new subject.

sleeping-cat-on-a-windowsill.note: Rejected before image generation: preflight back-check found the existing sleepy-cat lesson too close in subject and drawing problem.

sparrow-on-a-branch.note: Reviewed six-panel sparrow process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, derivative, JSON-LD, internal-link, and asset checks.

vintage-camera-on-a-strap.note: Slug locked for image generation by preflight; resolve before any new subject.

vintage-typewriter.note: Reviewed six-panel typewriter process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.
